_meta: Join table schemas for many-to-many relationships between entities. All join tables use wiki_page_title as the FK on both sides — these match the UNIQUE NOT NULL wiki_page_title column on every entity table. Rows where either FK does not resolve to an existing entity row are skipped at seed time (entities filtered out by the 10k/20k caps).

fk_columns._meta: Many-to-one relationships handled as FK columns on the entity table, not as join tables.

comics.series_wiki_page_title.description: Which series this comic issue belongs to. Derived from naming convention: 'Amazing Spider-Man Vol 1 300' → series 'Amazing_Spider-Man_Vol_1'. Null if the issue's series was not scraped.

character_teams._meta: Characters who are or were members of a team, including leaders. Populated from team CurrentMembers / FormerMembers / Leaders infobox fields via extractWikiLinks().

role.description: Role of the character in the team. Derived from which field the link appeared in: Leaders → leader, CurrentMembers → member, FormerMembers → former_member.

character_events._meta: Characters who participated in an event, tagged by role. Populated from event Protagonists / Antagonists / Others infobox fields via extractWikiLinks().

role.description: Role of the character in the event. Derived from which field the link appeared in: Protagonists → protagonist, Antagonists → antagonist, Others → other.

comic_characters._meta: Characters who appear in a comic issue, tagged by appearance type. Populated from comic Appearing1 infobox field via extractWikiLinks().

appearance_type.description: Role of the character in the issue. Derived from which section of the Appearing field the link appeared in: Featured Characters → featured, Supporting Characters → supporting, Antagonists → antagonist, Other Characters → other.

event_comics._meta: Comics that are part of an event's reading list or tie-ins. Populated from event Part1–PartN and TieIns infobox fields. Part fields use {{cl|Title}} templates (not wiki links) — extractWikiLinks() handles the Part fields after resolving {{cl}} to the page title string.

reading_order.description: Position in the event's reading list (1-based). Null for tie-ins.

type.description: Whether this comic is a main reading list entry (Part1–PartN) or a tie-in (TieIns field).
